public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as border assessor.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Panim, that reads as someone grave, measured, and ritual-aware, with constant awareness of consequence, grief, and divine mediation, and the habits of a border assessor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of border assessor in and around House Panim, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House Panim workable through the obligations of border assessor while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Panim.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around House Panim, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of border assessor visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Lume Riteswell can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Lume Riteswell can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Lume Riteswell carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Panim: the part of House Panim where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
